{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Heaven's Glory pass
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|People are pouring from the [[Heaven's Glory pass]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
